splits.title: President Grant's Dedicatory Prayer
splits.author: Heber J. Grant
splits.start_boundary: President Grant's Dedicatory Prayer Following is the dedicatory prayer
splits.end_boundary: Jesus Christ our Redeemer. Amen and Amen.

splits.title: Now is the Time
splits.author: Annie G. Lauritzen
splits.start_boundary: NOW IS THE TIME Annie G. Lauritzen, Oakland,

files.notes: The file contains President Grant's dedicatory prayer for the Alberta Temple at Cardston, followed by a poem by Annie G. Lauritzen. The prayer is the main content, with the poem appearing at the very end. Running headers with page numbers (482, 483, 484, 485, 486, 487) are embedded throughout the prayer text.
